title: DRAG Pulses: Derivative Removal by Adiabatic Gate
description: Master DRAG pulse techniques for suppressing leakage to non-computational states. Understand the physics of leakage, derive the DRAG correction, and learn calibration procedures for optimal pulse performance.
learningObjectives: Explain the physics of leakage errors in transmon qubits
Derive the DRAG correction from the three-level Hamiltonian
Implement DRAG pulses with proper amplitude and phase relationships
Design calibration experiments for DRAG coefficient optimization
Analyze the tradeoffs between leakage suppression and other error sources
